description: Seeded P4 fix-cycle violation, denylist-layer-only proof: an identifier-shaped key (`patientName`) placed inside `input.history`, the intentionally-open, wire-compatible boolean-map object (SPIKE-003 RQ4, mirrored from schemas/patient-input.schema.json's own booleanMap $def). The SCHEMA layer alone cannot reject this -- booleanMap deliberately admits any key name so real clinical fact names stay open -- so this fixture exists specifically to prove the identifier-denylist procedural layer (lib/identifier-denylist.mjs) is load-bearing, not redundant with the schema layer.
